notes:
vMLX 1.5.57 checkpoint release

Highlights:
- Fresh signed and notarized checkpoint build so GitHub, updater, download page, and PyPI can move past the stale 1.5.56 release surface.
- Carries the current vMLX Python engine runtime fixes for Gemma4 QAT/JANG_4M source smokes, Gemma4 tool-parser modality sentinel cleanup, Qwen/N2 Responses/tool-call tracing work, cache/L2 proof hooks, and current panel/runtime packaging surface.
- Keeps release manifest truth visible: this is a usable checkpoint release, not a claim that every open runtime/model-family row is production-green.

Verification:
- Built Sequoia and Tahoe arm64 DMGs from vmlx 1.5.57 source and bundled Python engine version 1.5.57.
- Sequoia DMG accepted by Apple notarization id 78aeae6b-14c1-4c14-8da5-d428908b2079, stapled, Gatekeeper accepted, and verified by panel/scripts/verify-release-dmgs.sh.
- Tahoe DMG accepted by Apple notarization id 08e020a1-0b93-43c3-b3e9-9fd6bd83e723, stapled, Gatekeeper accepted, and verified by panel/scripts/verify-release-dmgs.sh.
- Checkpoint prepackage manifest was generated with explicit override because the full live model matrix still has open rows.

Known follow-up:
- N2/Nex N2 Pro JANG_1L/JANGTQ live 128GB runtime/cache/API/UI proof remains the highest priority after publishing this checkpoint.
- MiMo JANG/JANGTQ artifact/logit/quant-contract and UI/media proof remains open.
- Gemma MXFP/JANG media/audio/video proof beyond no-media QAT smokes remains open.
- Same-model Responses direct/gateway/tunnel raw SSE parity for content deltas, function-call argument deltas, output_index correctness, and no raw XML/tool leaks remains open.
- Installed-app full model-family matrix is not fully green; this checkpoint is signed/notarized to unblock users while proof continues.

DMG SHA256:
- Sequoia: 68bfea742acf991887d7cf6858a1300fd20c26b3cd49f0e6601d88506f379525
- Tahoe: bafe3e4329b341f993ee0c25e34c0bef78131e90066a8b72f3a5ead8b6160ef7
